caption: A man with a beard, wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap with a white logo, and over-ear headphones, is seen in a recording studio. He is laughing with his eyes closed and head tilted back. In front of him is a professional microphone on a stand. He wears a gold chain and a gold bracelet on his right wrist. Behind him is a white wall featuring a repetitive pattern of five-pointed stars and the words "EMPIRE HUSTLE". Two logos appear on the screen: one on the left reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and another on the right reads "BOSS TALK 101". In the lower frames, text on his shirt reading "CHECK IT" becomes partially visible. Across the sequence, the man continues to laugh and lean slightly forward, with his hands moving near the microphone.
